data.user_prompt: Who are the best mental health counseling providers in Louisville, KY?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response claude Who are the best mental health counseling providers in Louisville, KY?

sections.text:
Here is a roundup of some of the **best mental health counseling providers in Louisville, KY**, ranging from large multi-service centers to highly rated individual practices:

---

### 🏥 1. **Kentucky Counseling Center (KCC)**
📍 1169 Eastern Pkwy #3328, Louisville, KY 40217
🌐 [kentuckycounselingcenter.com](https://kentuckycounselingcenter.com)

Kentucky Counseling Center is one of the largest mental health providers in Kentucky, with licensed therapists and psychiatric providers offering in-person counseling and statewide telehealth services for adults, teens, and children.

annotations.title: Mental Health Counseling and Psychiatry | Kentucky Counseling Center

sections.text: KCC Louisville provides counseling, psychiatry, medication management, and targeted case management for children and adults without long wait times.

annotations.title: Counseling and Therapy in Louisville KY - Kentucky Counseling Center

sections.text: They accept many major insurances including Medicaid, Anthem, Passport, Molina, Aetna, Humana, United, Cigna, Optum, and more.

annotations.title: Counseling and Therapy in Louisville KY - Kentucky Counseling Center

sections.text: Same-week therapy appointments are available, with most clients able to schedule their first appointment and see a provider the same week.

annotations.title: Mental Health Counseling and Psychiatry | Kentucky Counseling Center
Mental Health Counseling and Psychiatry | Kentucky Counseling Center

sections.text: Grace Psychological Services has been ranked in the top 3 best psychologists in Louisville by ThreeBestRated.com, recognized as a top Marriage Counselor by Kev's Best, and holds 5-star Google Reviews.

annotations.title: How to Find the Best Therapist in Louisville, KY: Your 2025 Guide

sections.text: Grace Psychological Services was also honored as one of the Best Mental Health Providers in Louisville in LEO Weekly's 2025 Readers' Choice Awards.

annotations.title: How to Find the Best Therapist in Louisville, KY: Your 2025 Guide

sections.text: LifeStance offers expert mental health care in Louisville, KY, with convenient online or in-person counseling, therapy, psychiatry, and medication management.

annotations.title: Best Mental Health Counselors Near Me in Louisville, KY | WebMD

sections.text:
They have multiple counselors on staff specializing in anxiety, depression, grief, PTSD/trauma, and more.

### 🏥 4. **Positive Psychiatry of Louisville**

Positive Psychiatry of Louisville is a husband-and-wife shared effort by Drs. Robert Stewart (MD) and Shari Stewart (DMin), started over twenty-five years ago with the mission to provide skilled, compassionate outpatient psychiatric and psychotherapeutic care in a warm, inviting setting.

annotations.title: Best Mental Health Counselors Near Me in Louisville, KY | WebMD

sections.text: Bridge Counseling & Wellness is one of the top-rated counseling and mental health providers in Louisville, KY, according to Yelp's updated 2026 rankings.

annotations.title: THE BEST 10 COUNSELING & MENTAL HEALTH in LOUISVILLE, KY - Updated 2026 - Hours - Yelp

sections.text:
Reviewers highlight the wonderful, accommodating staff and smooth scheduling process.

### 🏥 6. **Counseling Now Louisville**
🌐 [counselingnow.com](https://counselingnow.com/ky-local-counseling/top-counseling-in-louisville/)

Counseling Now Louisville offers a diverse range of mental health services with therapists skilled in a variety of therapeutic techniques including CBT, DBT, and EMDR, catering to individual, family, and trauma-related needs.

annotations.title: Top Counseling in Louisville: Your Guide to Finding the Right Therapist - Counseling Now

sections.text: Central to their approach is the Collaborative Care Model, which encourages frequent psychiatric consultations and caseload reviews to improve patient outcomes.

annotations.title: Top Counseling in Louisville: Your Guide to Finding the Right Therapist - Counseling Now
